evaluation.summary: A meta‑classifier ensemble of VADER and a technical sentiment lexicon achieves a MAE of 0.139 on synthetic technical sentences, substantially improving over baseline VADER and direct lexicon injection.
next_directions: Validate the ensemble on real-world technical corpora to assess generalizability
Investigate why the static weighted ensemble underperforms and whether weighting schemes can be optimized
Explore integration with transformer‑based language models for richer contextual sentiment cues
